PROSECUTING ATTIC RNEY
RULES THAT BOARD CAN

pages.raw_text:
Last years land values will be
equalized by the board OF eQuali-
cation acting upon an opinion Sc
cured this morning from Prosecutor
r. H. Barnhart, who says:


"All real estate situated in Spo-
kane county must be listed in each
odd numbered year and equalized
by the board"


1t was generally believed that
land could not be equalized this
year. At the request of many own
ers, the matter was taken mp with
the county's legal adviser.


People who had a kick last year
and did not know it may put II be-
fore the board between now and
Aug. "a II they fail to do so with
in this time there will be no fur
Their recourse. as the board adj
journs on that date.


When ii became known yesterday
that the board was to take up this
work the Farmers Telephone line.
called the "Barbed Wire line" got
busy with the result that this
morning the boards sanctum was
invaded by % Spring valley farm
ers, headed by Charles Anus and
j. j. Crabtree. They have no par
ticular kick about values In their
township, but want to know why
other townships In the southern
part OF the county, where the land
is practically of the same value M
that in Spring valley, Is valued In
some cases less and In other casca
more
